prompt: Sprint: mature end-to-end-loop telemetry feature with privacy-safe local measurement evidence, backlog and GitHub Copilot gates active.
commands_or_evidence: Added scripts/test_telemetry_privacy.py as a stdlib-only local smoke test for telemetry aggregation and forbidden-key rejection.
Updated references/local-telemetry.md, scripts/install.sh, and scripts/validate_skill.py so the helper is documented, packaged, and validated.
Verification commands are recorded in the sprint report and local validator output.
GitHub Actions Validate skill run 28331217477 passed on commit ba70cb5.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Telemetry privacy behavior is testable locally without network writes.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: scripts/test_telemetry_privacy.py imports local helpers, uses tempfile, and performs no network actions.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Recorder and aggregator reject forbidden raw/private keys.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: The smoke test asserts aggregator rejection of command/args and recorder rejection of stdout.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Installed helper packaging stays aligned with documented telemetry commands.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: scripts/install.sh copies scripts/test_telemetry_privacy.py and validator checks that copied-helper list.

learning_candidates.text: Telemetry privacy smoke test covers fixture aggregation plus forbidden command/stdout key rejection without network writes.

copilot_findings.summary: PR #5 Copilot comments were re-read; existing two comments are addressed by current branch changes, no new inline comments were observed before this slice.

items.summary: Validator privacy check should reject command/args in telemetry fixture.
Install script should copy documented telemetry helper scripts.
items.action: extended to include the new privacy test helper

notes: Local privacy self-test slice; GitHub Actions validation is green for the pushed branch tip.
